svg.text: MOZA MTQ Throttle Panel - Button Reference (js2)
throttle 1-65 + axes · buttons 44-48 are absent on the device
Throttle forward = axis (RY); reverse = rear-detent button 34. FLAPS & Speedbrake levers drive analog axes (Slider / Dial) in Mining / Salvage modes; their click detents (31-43) are unbound.
